name: Canarias - Tenerife
description: Multispectral satellite pass over Tenerife, Canary Islands

system_prompts.terrain: Classify this satellite image into land cover percentages. The percentages should sum to 1.0. Avoid zeros and avoid equal distributions.
system_prompts.fire_risk: Detect fire or volcanic hotspots. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
system_prompts.algae: Detect algae blooms in coastal waters. Output ONLY JSON: {"detected": boolean, "bbox": [x1,y1,x2,y2]}
